name: Bus Simulator VR - Bus Driving Game

reviews.review_description: Played 5 minutes.  Worst game. Glitches, no refund option.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that you had a negative experience. We truly appreciate your feedback and are actively working on fixing glitches to improve the gameplay. Your input helps us make the game better, and we hope you’ll give it another try after future updates. Thank you for sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: It is horrible the worst game I ever played in my life in a Vr or in in a game I regret getting this game.

developer_response.body: Dear Player, we are very sorry to see you are not satisfied with the game. We would like to suggest you that we are adding more busses, environments, modes and features in this game in coming update. Please let us know about your favourite features, you want to see in the game. We would like to sorry on your bad experience with the game. Please leave us your suggestions, questions on futlixgames@gmail.com. Thank you for your feedback.
